LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER POTRERO HILLS LANDFILL INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PREJUDGMENT INTEREST ACCRUES FROM AUGUST 13, 2012, THE DATE OF THE AWARD. RESPONDENT IS NOT THE PREVAILING PARTY AND IS NOT ENTITLED TO FEES. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077 =302/HK
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF POTRERO HILLS LANDFILL INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-05-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER POTRERO HILLS LANDFILL INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT THE RATTO GROUP OF COMPANIES INC. $2,516,762.00 PRINCIPAL, $861,811.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $29,903.84 INTEREST, $142,354.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,550,830.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JACK HURSH OF DORSEY & WHITNEY LLP, TEL. NO. (650) 843-2762 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. DOUGLAS C. STRAUS OF THE ARCHER NORRIS LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (925) 930-6600 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER POTRERO HILLS LANDFILL INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is Granted. Prejudgment interest accrues from August 13, 2012, the date of the award. Respondent is not the prevailing party and is not entitled to fees. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/HK
